title: BSNL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: BSNL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Full Stack Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
